item.title: SIM Card Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SIM Card Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecoverysof
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Do you have any idea how to restore accidentally deleted pictures from corrupted SIM card? Then do not waste your time just download SIM Card Recovery Tool from website www.filesrecovery.in which is highly useful to recover missing text messages, notification and event alert from damage SIM card.
[read more]

item.title: Pen Drive File Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive File Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecoverysof
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive File Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Want to recover lost data from inaccessible USB drive? If yes then see www.filesrecovery.in company URL for Pen Drive File Recovery Tool that provides easy way to bring back formatted or damaged folders and documents from jump drive of all storage capacity without wasting your precious time.

item.title: Android File Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android File Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverydata
item.itunes:summary:
Android File Restore Program
(Utilities)
Are you tensed for recovering of erased pictures from android devices? If yes then purchase Android File Restore Program that gives comprehensive way to rescue misplaced video songs from logically crashed android memory card without any alteration. Cost effective android storage media repairing utility gives facility to relocate deleted business folders, mp3/mp4 songs and movies from infected android based hard disk in simplified manner.

[read more]

item.title: RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
item.description:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RPGMaker MV/MZ Save Editor
(Utilities)
This is a tool for editing RPGMaker save files. It currently supports save files written by RPG Maker MV (.rpgsave) & MZ (.rmmzsave), but support for other versions of RPGMaker is planned for the future.
It uses Node.js for the backend and Electron for the GUI, which means you can interact with it using npm.

Works without internet access.
[read more]

item.title: Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL
(Utilities)
Database transmission application converts MSSQL data contents into new MySQL database and provide comprehensive database relocation solution. Software convert all data types, default value, trigger, attributes, null value, key constraints, like primary key, unique key etc. Graphical user interface oriented application makes data entry quick and convenient and also run the application without any user interaction or using command line parameter. Database migration program compatible with a lot of character sets (including Unicode utf-8) and provide efficiency to transfer Microsoft SQL data records into newly database. Utility provides comprehensive database conversion solution, highest performance scalability and reliability to meet the requirements of database and transmit selected rows, column, attributes, tables fields and key constraints into MySQL database. Software can convert single or groups of tables from database and uses an interactive and organized algorithm makes the conversion of fully loaded databases done in few seconds. Easy to use applications maintain data integrity and completely transfer Microsoft SQL databases to MySQL server. Utility support all major Microsoft SQL data types and converts complete database or selected table contents simply and competently and increased performance and cross platform capability. Software Features: * Convert database into new destination database, or merge existing destination database as replacing names of tables. * Support different Microsoft Windows operating system Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. * GUI based tool supports different version of Microsoft SQL server express and Microsoft SQL server. * Software migrate selected tables, rows, columns, data, default values, primary key, unique key, null value, and indexes along with all attributes. * Trial version with help option available does not require any technical knowledge to operate software.

[read more]
item.description:
Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL
(Utilities)
Database transmission application converts MSSQL data contents into new MySQL database and provide comprehensive database relocation solution. Software convert all data types, default value, trigger, attributes, null value, key constraints, like primary key, unique key etc. Graphical user interface oriented application makes data entry quick and convenient and also run the application without any user interaction or using command line parameter. Database migration program compatible with a lot of character sets (including Unicode utf-8) and provide efficiency to transfer Microsoft SQL data records into newly database. Utility provides comprehensive database conversion solution, highest performance scalability and reliability to meet the requirements of database and transmit selected rows, column, attributes, tables fields and key constraints into MySQL database. Software can convert single or groups of tables from database and uses an interactive and organized algorithm makes the conversion of fully loaded databases done in few seconds. Easy to use applications maintain data integrity and completely transfer Microsoft SQL databases to MySQL server. Utility support all major Microsoft SQL data types and converts complete database or selected table contents simply and competently and increased performance and cross platform capability. Software Features: * Convert database into new destination database, or merge existing destination database as replacing names of tables. * Support different Microsoft Windows operating system Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. * GUI based tool supports different version of Microsoft SQL server express and Microsoft SQL server. * Software migrate selected tables, rows, columns, data, default values, primary key, unique key, null value, and indexes along with all attributes. * Trial version with help option available does not require any technical knowledge to operate software.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Migrate MSSQL Database to MySQL
(Utilities)
Database transmission application converts MSSQL data contents into new MySQL database and provide comprehensive database relocation solution. Software convert all data types, default value, trigger, attributes, null value, key constraints, like primary key, unique key etc. Graphical user interface oriented application makes data entry quick and convenient and also run the application without any user interaction or using command line parameter. Database migration program compatible with a lot of character sets (including Unicode utf-8) and provide efficiency to transfer Microsoft SQL data records into newly database. Utility provides comprehensive database conversion solution, highest performance scalability and reliability to meet the requirements of database and transmit selected rows, column, attributes, tables fields and key constraints into MySQL database. Software can convert single or groups of tables from database and uses an interactive and organized algorithm makes the conversion of fully loaded databases done in few seconds. Easy to use applications maintain data integrity and completely transfer Microsoft SQL databases to MySQL server. Utility support all major Microsoft SQL data types and converts complete database or selected table contents simply and competently and increased performance and cross platform capability. Software Features: * Convert database into new destination database, or merge existing destination database as replacing names of tables. * Support different Microsoft Windows operating system Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. * GUI based tool supports different version of Microsoft SQL server express and Microsoft SQL server. * Software migrate selected tables, rows, columns, data, default values, primary key, unique key, null value, and indexes along with all attributes. * Trial version with help option available does not require any technical knowledge to operate software.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecoverysof
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Flexible and safe to use Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool easily recovers vanished images, video clips, pictures etc from digicam using advance and standard search mode without require any kinds of technical skill. Economical Digital camera retrieval application facilitates attractive GUI so that user can easily understand software features.
[read more]
item.description:

Flexible and safe to use Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool easily recovers vanished images, video clips, pictures etc from digicam using advance and standard search mode without require any kinds of technical skill. Economical Digital camera retrieval application facilitates attractive GUI so that user can easily understand software features.

(Utilities)
Flexible and safe to use Digital Camera Photo Recovery Tool easily recovers vanished images, video clips, pictures etc from digicam using advance and standard search mode without require any kinds of technical skill. Economical Digital camera retrieval application facilitates attractive GUI so that user can easily understand software features.

item.title: Restore Memory Card Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Memory Card Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Memory Card Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Memory card files data recovery tool recovers, restore deleted, damaged, corrupted, formatted pictures, music, video, folders of various file types including mpeg , AVI, GIF, PNG, WAV, MOV, RIFF, MIDI, TIF, TIFF, 3GP, JPG, and other application document file formats.Unerase, Unformat, Undelete data from various memory card storage media like extreme digital card xD card, compact flash memory, mobile cell phone communicator, pc handheld computer, usb memory card storage media, multimedia memory card mmc, secure digital card sD card, pen drive memory card, smart cards, micro drive etc through utilizing this read-only restoration utility.This utility is considered as the safest and nondestructive utility that can provide preview of recoverable files before recovery. The software ensures restoration of photographs images audioThe software is helpful in restoring data even if your device is corrupted, damaged due to virus threats, hardware malfunction, power surges or due to any other human error. Features:* Retrieve and recover data from mmc, compact flash memory, secure digital card, smart card, PDA, xD card, mobile communicator, handheld computer, pocket pc, pen drive memory cards etc * Facilitates information recovery, digital image recovery, photograph restoration, picture restoration, flash card recovery, digital photo restoration, image retrieval. * Recovers data files folders when drive not formatted message displayed by windows 11,10,8,7 and apple Mac OSX or other operating system e.g. Linux Novell. * Restore information of different file types like jpg, jpeg, bmp, midi, tif, gif, avi, wav and many more. * Supports various kinds of USB port memory card readers, memory stick cards, compact flash memory cards, secure digital card etc. * Easiest and Quickest restoration tool for digital files and folders. * Revive documents that deleted accidentally or logically corrupted ensuring your business continuity.

[read more]
item.description:
Restore Memory Card Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Memory card files data recovery tool recovers, restore deleted, damaged, corrupted, formatted pictures, music, video, folders of various file types including mpeg , AVI, GIF, PNG, WAV, MOV, RIFF, MIDI, TIF, TIFF, 3GP, JPG, and other application document file formats.Unerase, Unformat, Undelete data from various memory card storage media like extreme digital card xD card, compact flash memory, mobile cell phone communicator, pc handheld computer, usb memory card storage media, multimedia memory card mmc, secure digital card sD card, pen drive memory card, smart cards, micro drive etc through utilizing this read-only restoration utility.This utility is considered as the safest and nondestructive utility that can provide preview of recoverable files before recovery. The software ensures restoration of photographs images audioThe software is helpful in restoring data even if your device is corrupted, damaged due to virus threats, hardware malfunction, power surges or due to any other human error. Features:* Retrieve and recover data from mmc, compact flash memory, secure digital card, smart card, PDA, xD card, mobile communicator, handheld computer, pocket pc, pen drive memory cards etc * Facilitates information recovery, digital image recovery, photograph restoration, picture restoration, flash card recovery, digital photo restoration, image retrieval. * Recovers data files folders when drive not formatted message displayed by windows 11,10,8,7 and apple Mac OSX or other operating system e.g. Linux Novell. * Restore information of different file types like jpg, jpeg, bmp, midi, tif, gif, avi, wav and many more. * Supports various kinds of USB port memory card readers, memory stick cards, compact flash memory cards, secure digital card etc. * Easiest and Quickest restoration tool for digital files and folders. * Revive documents that deleted accidentally or logically corrupted ensuring your business continuity.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Restore Memory Card Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Memory card files data recovery tool recovers, restore deleted, damaged, corrupted, formatted pictures, music, video, folders of various file types including mpeg , AVI, GIF, PNG, WAV, MOV, RIFF, MIDI, TIF, TIFF, 3GP, JPG, and other application document file formats.Unerase, Unformat, Undelete data from various memory card storage media like extreme digital card xD card, compact flash memory, mobile cell phone communicator, pc handheld computer, usb memory card storage media, multimedia memory card mmc, secure digital card sD card, pen drive memory card, smart cards, micro drive etc through utilizing this read-only restoration utility.This utility is considered as the safest and nondestructive utility that can provide preview of recoverable files before recovery. The software ensures restoration of photographs images audioThe software is helpful in restoring data even if your device is corrupted, damaged due to virus threats, hardware malfunction, power surges or due to any other human error. Features:* Retrieve and recover data from mmc, compact flash memory, secure digital card, smart card, PDA, xD card, mobile communicator, handheld computer, pocket pc, pen drive memory cards etc * Facilitates information recovery, digital image recovery, photograph restoration, picture restoration, flash card recovery, digital photo restoration, image retrieval. * Recovers data files folders when drive not formatted message displayed by windows 11,10,8,7 and apple Mac OSX or other operating system e.g. Linux Novell. * Restore information of different file types like jpg, jpeg, bmp, midi, tif, gif, avi, wav and many more. * Supports various kinds of USB port memory card readers, memory stick cards, compact flash memory cards, secure digital card etc. * Easiest and Quickest restoration tool for digital files and folders. * Revive documents that deleted accidentally or logically corrupted ensuring your business continuity.

[read more]

item.title: Files Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Files Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecoverysof
item.itunes:summary:
Files Recovery
(Utilities)
Data software recovery application provides facility to retrieve data, documents and text lost because of virus attack. Files Recovery software ensures to regain audio, video files that are deleted at time of sharing with other users. Data regaining tool is very easy to handle and run on your system without need of any expertise knowledge or assistant. File restore service is capable to recover music, images folders lost due to corrupt software.
[read more]
